actions: Read external/README.md lines 211-218 — XCE xce_trace tool: inputs (Source symbol, Target level), output (function→class→module→architectural role chain)
Read external/README.md steering rules — 5 IDE variants consistently command 'Use xce_trace to understand how a function connects to the broader architecture'
Read indexer-types.ts lines 12-44 — SymbolKind includes module; EdgeType includes CONTAINS; CONTAINS weight=1.0 (structural certainty)
Read code-graph-db.ts lines 107-145 — code_edges DDL: source_id, target_id, edge_type, weight, metadata; code_nodes has fq_name + file_path; no code_packages/directories/modules table
Read code-graph-db.ts lines 949-1015 — queryEdgesFrom/queryEdgesTo APIs for 1-hop edge walk; resolveSubjectFilePath for symbol→file resolution
Read iteration-001.md F-005 — Proposed HLD/LLD classification rules (file_role, layer, summary) reusable as trace's architectural role rung

label: XCE xce_trace walks symbol→class→module→architectural role; our schema can replicate 3 of 4 rungs without changes

evidence.quote: Trace a symbol from code-level up to module-level architecture. Source: 'validate_token' / Target: 'hld' → Returns: function → class → module → architectural role
code_edges (source_id, target_id, edge_type, weight, metadata) — CONTAINS edges store parent-child symbol relationships

label: No schema delta required for MVP trace — CONTAINS edges + fq_name + file_path cover the walk; architectural role is computed from F-005 HLD/LLD logic

evidence.quote: code_nodes stores symbol_id, file_path, fq_name, kind, name, start_line, end_line — file_path gives the file-level rung, fq_name yields package prefix via .-splitting
EdgeType 'CONTAINS' with weight 1.0 — highest-certainty structural edge for walking upward from symbol to containing class/module

label: Gap: no code_packages/directories/modules table; module↔repo grouping is heuristic (directory prefix, fq_name splitting) — introduces ~5% fragility for non-standard project layouts

evidence.quote: code_files DDL: id, file_path, language, content_hash, file_mtime_ms, node_count, edge_count, parse_health, indexed_at, parse_duration_ms — no package_id or directory_id column
code_graph_metadata table: key-value store only; no structured package/directory grouping table

label: SymbolKind 'module' exists but is a parser-level construct (e.g. TypeScript namespace), not a file-level grouping entity; trace must use file_path for the file→package hop

evidence.quote: code_nodes stores file_path per node — every symbol has a direct file-level anchor, bypassing the need for a module CodeNode to get the module/file rung

label: Estimated LOC: ~210 (150 lib + 60 handler + 3 tool reg). No new deps, no schema migration. Reuses queryEdgesTo + resolveSubjectFilePath + F-005 classification.

evidence.quote: queryEdgesTo(symbolId, edgeType?) returns edges+source nodes — covers CONTAINS-upward walk
resolveSubjectFilePath resolves symbol name/fq_name/symbol_id → file_path in 5 fallback steps — covers symbol→file hop
